message:
refactor(artifact-merge): consolidate validation into lintArtifact, remove deprecated validateArtifact

This commit removes the deprecated validateArtifact function and consolidates
all validation logic into the more comprehensive lintArtifact function. This
reduces code duplication and provides a single source of truth for artifact
validation with consistent error/warning codes.

artifact-merge.ts Changes:
- REMOVED: validateArtifact() function (~90 lines)
  - This function was superseded by lintArtifact which provides richer
    violation objects with IDs, severity levels, and fix suggestions
- REMOVED: validateReference() helper function (~35 lines)
- REMOVED: validateItemReferences() helper function (~25 lines)
- ADDED: Reference validation directly in lintArtifact with new violation IDs:
  - ER-REF-001: references must be an array
  - ER-REF-002: individual reference must be an object
  - ER-REF-003: reference missing 'session' field
  - ER-REF-004: reference missing 'item' field
  - ER-REF-005: reference has invalid relation value
- ADDED: Reference checks for all item types (hypotheses, predictions, tests,
  assumptions, critiques, anomalies)
- ADDED: Code comments in diff functions for clarity
- FIXED: Minor typo in TestLastRun JSDoc ("run result" → "result")

artifact-merge.test.ts Changes:
- REMOVED: validateArtifact test suite (~120 lines)
  - "warns on incomplete artifact"
  - "executes third-alternative / scale-check callbacks on non-empty sections"
  - "returns no warnings for a minimally complete artifact"
- ADDED: New "lintArtifact (legacy checks)" test suite with equivalent tests:
  - Tests now verify EH-001, EH-003, EA-002, WC-001 violation codes
  - Tests properly construct artifacts with required fields (RT, anchors)
  - Assertions check violation IDs instead of warning codes
- UPDATED: Test data throughout to use consistent field values:
  - Predictions use { H1: "A", H2: "B", H3: "?" } pattern
  - Tests use { name: "T1/T2", procedure: "P", ... } pattern
  - Assumptions use { name: "A1/A2/A3", ... } pattern
  - Critiques use { name: "C1/C2", attack: "A", evidence: "E", ... } pattern
- FIXED: Multiple test assertions to match actual lintArtifact output format
- ADDED: Explicit rationale assertions for killed items (e.g., "Removed from artifact")
- UPDATED: formatDiffHuman assertions to use uppercase "PROMOTED TO" format

Migration path: Code that previously called validateArtifact() should now use
lintArtifact() and check report.violations for issues. The violation IDs
provide more granular error identification than the old warning codes.
